title: Remote Health Insurance Tools Review: Gusto vs Justworks vs Zenefits Comprehensive Comparison | 2026 Review
description: Remote health insurance management challenges. Comprehensive review of Gusto, Justworks, and Zenefits health insurance management platforms. Compare insura.
content:
Remote Health Insurance Tools Review: Gusto vs Justworks vs Zenefits

Overview

This comprehensive review compares Gusto, Justworks, and Zenefits for remote team health insurance management. We analyze benefits administration, enrollment workflows, carrier options, and pricing for distributed teams in 2026.

Key Challenges for Remote Teams

Remote teams face unique health insurance challenges:

  • Geographic distribution: Managing coverage for employees across multiple states
  • Enrollment coordination: Processing enrollments without in-person HR support
  • Carrier selection: Finding coverage options for dispersed workforce
  • Compliance complexity: Meeting varying state insurance requirements

Platform Comparison

Gusto

Gusto provides health insurance administration integrated with payroll at $6-12/user/month plus base fee. Features include multi-state coverage, automatic enrollment, and carrier partnerships. Ideal for small remote teams needing unified HR and benefits management.

Justworks

Justworks offers PEO services with health insurance at $50-100/user/month. Features include group rates, compliance support, and dedicated HR assistance. Strong choice for teams needing PEO-level support and comprehensive benefits.

Zenefits

Zenefits provides benefits administration platform at $8-14/user/month. Features include carrier integrations, ACA compliance, and mobile enrollment. Best for teams requiring flexible benefits management without PEO commitment.

Feature Comparison

FeatureGustoJustworksZenefits
Payroll IntegrationYesYesAdd-on
Multi-state CoverageYesYesYes
PEO ServicesNoYesNo
ACA ComplianceYesYesYes
Mobile AppYesYesYes
Dedicated SupportBasicYesAdd-on

Selection Recommendations

For Integrated HR: Choose Gusto for unified payroll, benefits, and HR. Cost-effective for small remote teams under 50 employees.

For PEO Support: Select Justworks for comprehensive HR assistance and group insurance rates. Ideal for teams lacking dedicated HR staff.

For Flexible Administration: Choose Zenefits for standalone benefits platform. Integration options suit teams with existing payroll systems.
author: Human Resources Expert
